description_for_human: Connect your AI agent to WhatsApp Business. Send messages, take orders, generate payment links (Stripe / Mercado Pago / SPEI / OXXO), hand off to humans. Mexico-first.
description_for_model: TramsTec is an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that exposes WhatsApp Business and Mexican payment rails (SPEI, OXXO, Stripe, Mercado Pago) as typed tools. Use this when you need to: send/receive WhatsApp messages, create or confirm orders, generate payment links or SPEI instructions, check payment status, look up customers, summarize conversations, hand off to a human, or update customer consent. Connection: HTTP/SSE at https://mcp.tramstec.com/sse with Authorization: Bearer <api_key>. Pricing is published at https://tramstec.com/#precios. Available tools: whatsapp_send_message, whatsapp_send_template, customer_lookup, product_search, inventory_check, order_create_draft, order_confirm, payment_link_create, spei_instructions_generate, payment_status_check, handoff_to_human, conversation_summarize, consent_update.
